title: Miss Valentine Joins the Attack
description: On pages 16–18, miss valentine joins the attack as mr. 3 separates Vivi from her protectors and turns Little Garden’s battlefield into a calculated execution ground.
scene: Miss Valentine Joins the Attack. Mr. 3 separates Vivi from her protectors and turns Little Garden’s battlefield into a calculated execution ground. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We won't be killing you just yet...!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: We're only here to carry you away,

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Mr. 3...!? The man with the "DORU DORU Devil Devil Fruit"...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: That's right. He can freely control the wax that comes forth from his body.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Damn you... just what're you planning to do...!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hm? You want to know what I'm doing?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: to make art, can't you see?

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on miss valentine joins the attack. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
